name: Prompt Isolation
description: Separate trusted instructions, user input, retrieved content, and tool outputs so untrusted data is not treated as authority.
implementation_guidance: Represent external content as quoted data with source labels and explicit trust levels.
Keep system and developer instructions outside user-editable or retrievable text channels.
Design prompts and orchestration code so retrieved content cannot redefine task authority.
verification_methods: Test direct and indirect instruction conflicts across all input channels.
Inspect prompt assembly code for trusted and untrusted content boundaries.
Confirm response evidence preserves the source of each instruction-like statement.
